gist.headline: Daily News Delivery
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README and social news pipeline files.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and updates the internal social media pipeline.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a news reporter or organizing a bulletin board with daily updates, representing the automated news pipeline.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh piece of paper to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
